description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open floor plan. The exterior features a combination of dark and light wall panels, large windows, and a prominent central entrance with a small set of steps. The front facade is accented by vertical greenery and symmetrical window placement, while the rear includes a covered carport connected by a long driveway. The interior layout is visible, showing multiple rooms, including a large living area and dining space. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and functional outdoor access.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a covered carport connected by a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, vertical greenery, and the attached carport with driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the driveway, the covered carport, and the side wall with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional windows, and the full span of the carport and driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear rooms, side windows, and the greenery along the side wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
